instruction: Drag the pictures into the right order
modellingTip: Modelling Tip: Use time words like first, next, and then while you talk through the story.

steps.label: Start the tower
steps.altText: A child beginning to stack blocks on a table.

steps.label: Add more blocks
steps.altText: A child stacking more blocks to make the tower taller.

steps.label: Finished tower
steps.altText: A child smiling with a tall tower of blocks.

steps.label: Pick up the coat
steps.altText: A child holding a yellow raincoat before putting it on.

steps.label: Put the coat on
steps.altText: A child pulling on a yellow raincoat.

steps.label: Ready to go outside
steps.altText: A child wearing the raincoat and ready to go out.

steps.label: Start the snowman
steps.altText: A child beginning a snowman with the first snowball.

steps.label: Build it up
steps.altText: A child adding another snowball to build the snowman.

steps.label: Finished snowman
steps.altText: A child standing with a completed snowman.
